skill_schema.description: Every action in the game is a skill. Skills are composed of atoms with a skill_flow that defines execution order and parallelism.

fields.name: Display name
fields.category: movement | combat | magic | control | guide | social | craft
fields.description: What the skill does in game terms
fields.lore: Why this skill exists in the world's narrative
fields.is_innate: true if granted at birth. Cannot be lost.
fields.atoms: Array of effect atoms. Each atom is ONE effect.
fields.skill_flow: Execution order. Sequential list or parallel groups. If omitted, atoms execute in list order.
fields.cooldown: Seconds before the skill can be used again
fields.input_type: button | trigger | hold | toggle | axis | gesture

skill_flow.description: Defines how atoms are executed. If omitted, atoms run sequentially in list order.
skill_flow.default: If skill_flow is omitted from the skill, atoms execute sequentially in the order they appear in the atoms array.

atom_types.spawn: Instantiate a scene asset. Params: asset, offset, dimensions, duration.
atom_types.movement: Apply movement to caster or spawned object. Params: direction, speed.
atom_types.push: On collision: push the target. Params: force, weight_multiplier.
atom_types.damage: On collision: damage the target. Params: amount, damage_type, element.
atom_types.camera: Rotate camera. Params: axis, direction, base_speed.
atom_types.buff: Temporary stat modification. Params: stat, value, kind, duration.
atom_types.status: Apply status effect. Params: kind, duration.

defaults.note: If spawn atom's duration is omitted, engine uses 0.5s.
